fields.title: agent-browser Command
fields.help: Path to the agent-browser executable. Leave as 'agent-browser' if it is already in PATH.

fields.title: Allow Unrestricted Navigation
fields.help: When disabled, Browser-Orb blocks non-http(s) URLs and local/private hosts. When enabled, local/private/file/about navigation is permitted.

fields.title: Allowed Domains
fields.help: Optional domain allowlist, one per line or comma-separated. Example: example.com or *.example.com. Applied when unrestricted navigation is disabled.

fields.title: Allow JavaScript Eval
fields.help: Enable the browser_eval tool. Disabled by default because it executes arbitrary page JavaScript.

fields.title: Allow Persistent Auth
fields.help: Enable session persistence through agent-browser so login cookies/localStorage survive browser restarts.

fields.title: Persistent Auth Session
fields.help: Session bucket name used when persistent auth is enabled.

fields.title: Persistent Auth Key
fields.help: Optional 64-character hex key passed as AGENT_BROWSER_ENCRYPTION_KEY for encrypted persisted auth state.

fields.title: Headed Browser
fields.help: Show the browser window instead of running headless.

fields.title: Snapshot Interactive Only
fields.help: Default browser_snapshot behavior: include only interactive elements unless the tool call overrides it.

fields.title: Snapshot Compact Mode
fields.help: Default browser_snapshot behavior: remove empty structural elements unless the tool call overrides it.

fields.title: Snapshot Depth
fields.help: Default max depth for browser_snapshot. Use 0 or a negative value for the full tree.

fields.title: Screenshot Folder
fields.help: Folder used for Browser-Orb screenshots when the tool call does not provide a path.
